original_abstract: This recommendation provides a formal definition for the term “halogen bond,” categorizing it as a distinct class of inter- and intramolecular interactions. Specifically, the term refers to the attractive forces occurring between an electrophilic region of a halogen atom within a molecular entity and a nucleophilic region in the same or another molecular entity.
humanized_abstract: This recommendation provides a formal definition of the term halogen bond as a name for a class of inter- and intramolecular forces. According to this definition an halogen bond is an attractive force associated with the interaction between an electrophilic region of a halogen atom within a molecular entity and a nucleophilic region within the same or different molecular entities.

document.output: This recommendation provides a formal definition of the term halogen bond as a name for a class of inter- and intramolecular forces. According to this definition an halogen bond is an attractive force associated with the interaction between an electrophilic region of a halogen atom within a molecular entity and a nucleophilic region within the same or different molecular entities.
